notes: v385 — 🪤 Set a trailing stop when you buy. The buy ticket now has an optional trailing-stop %: the sell price starts that % below your buy and only ever RISES as the share climbs — it never loosens — so it locks in gains while letting a winner run. It works right alongside your 🎯 target and 🛑 stop; leave it blank for none. (Also in this batch: 🎯 scale-out exits for the auto-pilot — bank part of a position at target and let the rest ride.) Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
